slides.alt: Pasta bolognese dish finished with parmesan
slides.title: A welcoming Launceston pub serving proper food
slides.description: Discover the White Horse Inn through seasonal dishes, comforting favourites and the kind of warm hospitality that keeps people coming back.

slides.alt: Beef Wellington plated in a premium pub dining setting
slides.title: Classic pub dishes that are worth going out for.
slides.description: From elevated pub favourites to beautifully presented seasonal plates, the White Horse Inn combines quality food, friendly service and a relaxed atmosphere.

slides.alt: Selection of roast dinners with beef, lamb and traditional trimmings
slides.title: Familiar comforts and stunning Sunday Roasts.
slides.description: Whether you are joining us for a roast, a casual lunch or an evening meal, the White Horse Inn brings together local character, great food and easy hospitality.

slides.alt: Garden area at The Cricketers Inn
slides.title: Easy-going spaces for drinks, dining and catching up.
slides.description: Whether you are planning a meal, meeting friends or looking for a relaxed pub garden, our locations are designed to feel comfortable, social and easy to enjoy.

slides.alt: Exterior view of The Windmill pub
slides.title: Explore the venues that make up Barton Investors Group.
slides.description: Browse our collection of independent pubs and discover places shaped by local character, welcoming teams and a genuine community atmosphere.

slides.alt: Traditional pub bar pumps serving cask ales
slides.title: Local pubs where good beer and friendly service still matter.
slides.description: From familiar favourites to well-kept pints, our venues combine the comfort of a proper pub with the easy hospitality people return for.

slides.alt: Outdoor pub seating area with parasol in a beer garden
slides.title: Outdoor areas made for easy afternoons and longer evenings.
slides.description: Discover beer gardens and open-air seating across Barton Investors Group, ideal for casual drinks, laid-back lunches and making the most of good weather.

slides.alt: Beer garden at dusk with warm festoon lighting
slides.title: Places to eat, drink and unwind across Barton Investors Group.
slides.description: From relaxed outdoor spaces to welcoming local pubs, explore the venues that bring together friendly atmosphere, character and family-run hospitality.

slides.alt: Large bouquet of roses displayed on a pub bar
slides.title: The little touches help every venue feel welcoming.
slides.description: Across the group, atmosphere comes from more than the setting alone, with thoughtful details, warm service and spaces that feel cared for year-round.
